$schema_note: Auto-refreshed weekly by Claude scheduled task 'kurrus-news-refresh'. latestFromNebraskaland is pulled from https://magazine.outdoornebraska.gov/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?author=8 (Jeff's WordPress author ID). aroundJeff is editable by hand. lastUpdated is ISO 8601.

latestFromNebraskaland.title: Nebraskaland Digital Archive
latestFromNebraskaland.excerpt: Celebrate 100 years of the Nebraska outdoors in the newly expanded Nebraskaland Magazine Digital Archive.

latestFromNebraskaland.title: 100 Years Later
latestFromNebraskaland.excerpt: The predecessor of Nebraskaland Magazine, Outdoor Nebraska, was first published in June 1926. A century-mark essay on what's changed and what hasn't.

latestFromNebraskaland.title: Still Making Memories — A Family Tradition
latestFromNebraskaland.excerpt: The story of Justin Stofer, whose family is keeping the hunting tradition alive in Fillmore County.

latestFromNebraskaland.title: A Club for Carvers
latestFromNebraskaland.excerpt: The Central Flyway Decoy Collectors and Carvers Club is an eclectic group. World-class carvers next to first-time folks with the worry of 'I'm not sure if I can do this.'

latestFromNebraskaland.title: The Circle — The Jordy Bahl Story
latestFromNebraskaland.excerpt: Jordy, originally from Papillion, is a three-time All-American and a two-time national champion. A profile written from a family pheasant hunt.

aroundJeff.title: The Return of Donnie Bats — December 2026
aroundJeff.excerpt: The sequel to The Legend of Donnie Bats arrives this December. More heart, more humor, more ballfield trouble.

aroundJeff.title: Author in Residence — Papillion
aroundJeff.excerpt: Jeff continues his Author in Residence role in Papillion, working with student writers across multiple grade levels.

aroundJeff.title: Nebraska Book Awards 2026 — Children/YA submission underway
aroundJeff.excerpt: The Legend of Donnie Bats is being submitted to the Nebraska Book Awards 2026 in the Children/Young Adult category. Award announced fall 2026.
